texto: Any good business person applies financial discipline to everything they do. The movie business is and should be no different; I don't believe you have to sacrifice creativity to have business success. To the contrary, great art requires discipline.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Paula Wagner sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Any good business person applies financial discipline to everything they do. The movie business i…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, business, discipline, útil em momentos de reflexao.
